meaning: adj.悲伤的,悲哀的,可怜的,遗憾的
examples: She displayed a woeful ignorance of the rules.
Thy foolish reading hath wrought its woeful work at last, and ta'en thy wit away.
Its infrastructure is in woeful shape.
The '27 Yankees rolled up their impressive win total by beating the woeful St.
However, a series of woeful performances in friendlies would suggest the team is not improving.
